title: cornopteris sulcinervia
intro: Cornopteris sulcinervia, also known as the Sulcated Holly Fern, is a species of fern in the family Polypodiaceae. It is a plant native to Southeast Asia, used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The Sulcated Holly Fern has been shown to have health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of Cornopteris sulcinervia often involve infusions or decoctions of the plant's leaves, which can be consumed as teas or used topically for skin conditions.
